_about: Gold query set for §586/1992 (Czech Income Tax Act) retrieval eval. 'query' = natural user/agent phrasing (EN); 'query_cz' = LLM-authored Czech legal-term expansion/translation (the 'keyword + LLM-expansion' strategy input). 'gold' = acceptable section(s); a hit on ANY listed section counts. Labels drafted from Czech ITA structure and verified against corpus text; USER TO SPOT-CHECK.
